# Plan 01-01: Project Scaffold and REST API

## Objective

Create the foundational Rust project with Axum web server, SQLite database layer, and project CRUD REST API.

## Tasks

### Task 1: Rust project scaffold

Set up Cargo.toml with all dependencies and create the initial project structure.

### Task 2: REST API endpoints

Implement project CRUD endpoints and health check.
